基于 Rust russh 库构建，提供安全、高性能的 SSH 连接。支持密码和.message: Built on Rust's russh library for secure, high-performance SSH connections. Supports password and key authentication, proxy forwarding, and TOFU host key verification.

内置文件浏览器，直接在侧边栏管理远程文件。支持上传、下载、重命名、权限修改等操作.message: Built-in file explorer to manage remote files directly from the sidebar. Supports upload, download, rename, permission changes, and real-time transfer progress.

同时管理多个 SSH 和本地终端会话。支持 WebGL 硬件加速渲染、自定义字体.message: Manage multiple SSH and local terminal sessions simultaneously. WebGL hardware-accelerated rendering, custom fonts, keyword highlighting, and fuzzy command history search.

深色/浅色主题切换、可调整面板布局、快捷命令管理、多语言翻译、快捷键自定义，打造.message: Dark/light theme switching, resizable panel layouts, quick command management, multi-language translation, customizable shortcuts — build your own workflow.

基于 Tauri 和 React 构建，跨平台、安全、快速.message: Built with Tauri and React — cross-platform, secure, and fast

现代高性能 SSH 客户端，基于 Tauri 和 React 构建.message: A modern, high-performance SSH client built with Tauri and React
